name: Vegetable Tuna Casserole with Pretzel Topping
recipeIngredient: 1 can (6 oz.) water packed tuna, drained, rinsed
1/2 cup finely chopped red or green bell pepper
1 can (10 3/4 oz.) cream of celery soup
1 cup crushed pretzel twists or sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles to desired doneness as directed on package.
2. Drain; keep warm.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Spray a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish with nonstick cooking spray.
5. In a medium bowl, combine cooked noodles and all remaining ingredients except pretzels.
6. Spoon the mixture into the sprayed casserole dish; top with pretzels.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 to 30 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
